> ⚠️ **Never update the modpack over an existing profile.** Always create a NEW profile in your mod manager and re-download the modpack from scratch. Updating in place will break your install.
>
> **Lethal Company must be on the latest version (V80 minimum).** Outdated game versions cause crashes and lobby mismatches.
